startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of Rekrute URLs to start from. Defaults to the main job feed if empty.

maxListings.title: Max Jobs to Scrape
maxListings.description: Maximum number of jobs to extract. Set to 0 to scrape all available.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to be used by the scraper.
